results.title: Data Scientist (Remote) [Remote Job] @Sprouts Farmers Market
highlights:
Data Scientist (Remote) [Remote Job] @Sprouts Farmers Market
...
# Data Scientist (Remote)
...
Department:Data Analysis
...
Type:REMOTE
...
Region:Phoenix, AZ
...
Location:Phoenix, AZ
...
Experience:Mid-Senior level
...
PYTHONSQLMACHINE LEARNINGPOWERBITABLEAUMICROSOFT AZUREDATABRICKS
...
## Job Description
...
Posted on: June 13, 2026
...
OverviewThis is a fully remote opportunity. Sprouts is currently at the beginning of a journey to provide personalized experiences to all of our customers every time they interact with us. The Data Scientist will join a team of other data scientists and analysts in helping develop the machine learning models, recommender systems and processes to make that vision a reality. Overview Of ResponsibilitiesAnalytics & Business Partnering (70%)
...
Development, Machine Learning & Maintenance (30%)
...
- Train and Test Supervised and Unsupervised machine learning models to predict business outcomes, segment customers or products or create recommendations or other personalized content
- Work with IT to implement machine learning models into production
...
- In partnership with IT manage any automated ETL processes, narrowcast reports and maintenance of business intelligence & database servers supporting the Enterprise and Customer Analytics team.
...
- Participate in projects
...
- Continually
...
- Develop processes and algorithms to cleanse/standardize/join disparate data sources
...
- Partner with internal and external teams to integrate new sources of data into existing datasets and/or improve the reliability and availability of existing datasets

Qualifications
...
- Bachelor’s Degree in computer science, math or related field required
...
- Ideal candidate would have 2-5 years of prior experience in a joint business/technical role responsible for both development and delivering business results
...
- Prior role and/or project experience in Data Science demonstrating strong analytical and problem-solving skills
...
- Experience training and implementing supervised and unsupervised machine learning models
...
- Strong programming experience, preferably in Python
...
- Advanced level of experience with databases and writing SQL
...
- Advanced level of experience with Business Intelligence tools, such as, PowerBI, Tableau, etc.
...
- Experience with Microsoft Azure and Databricks a plus
...
- Experience with Microsoft Office Suite tools including Outlook, Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Access, Vizio, etc.
...
Sprouts Farmers Market
...

Driving Strategic Programs | Enabling Business Transformation | Leading with Impact As a Senior Enterprise Program Manager, I specialize in leading large-scale programs, and thrive at the intersection of strategy, execution, and continuous improvement. My track record of leading cross-functional teams, optimizing complex programs, and driving business transformation, spans a variety of industries, with an emphasis on retail, manufacturing and AI, directed at achieving meaningful scalable results. In addition, I bring a people-first approach, building strong relationships, fostering collaboration, and aligning diverse stakeholders to a shared vision. And my passion for continuous learning and innovation allows me to adapt to evolving business needs while delivering value-driven outcomes. Whether it’s exploring cutting-edge technologies, managing enterprise-wide transformations, or navigating the evolving retail landscape, I’m committed to delivering growth, efficiency, and innovation. : Carter R.

Activity: Carter R.
...
I was in the Sprouts Farmers Market HQ in Phoenix, watching hundreds of Sprouties try Kuli Kuli Foods products for the first time. Faces lighting up, questions flying, conversations that could never happen on a screen.
...
Right now, brands and retailers are both navigating real pressure: rising costs, economic uncertainty, and consumer priorities shifting faster than category plans can keep up. The easy move for everyone is to pull back and go transactional.
...
Sprouts is doing the opposite. Hannah Wickman , Justin Miloro, Brian Hillins , and the entire Sprouts team don't just carry our products — they co-create with us. They taste alongside us, ask hard questions, and find creative ways to solve problems together rather than around each other.
...
That's
...
, it matters more

results.title: Rebecca Satterlee
highlights:
Senior Lead at [Sprouts Farmers Market](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sprouts-farmers-market)
...
From the early days of the home computers I’ve been fascinated by emerging technologies, playing around with DOS systems and 3.5” floppies. When a move from urban to rural left computer availability limited, my interest was satisfied with cheaply available if outdated technical and art manuals as well as puzzle books with a variety of word and math games. These filtered into a curiosity to understand complex structures and communicate to others and has been a driving force leading me to an interest in data analytics, learning R Programming, SQL, Tabeuea, and completing my Google Data Analytics Certificate. Currently Senior Lead at Sprouts Farmers’ Market where my observational skill of identifying patterns and trends has been put to use predicting shopping habits that have increased profit by 30% as well as increasing customer satisfaction and retention by anticipating needs. An innate urge to analyze and optimize has resulted in identifying and sharing techniques for documentation, production, and communication following the mantra of ‘smarter not harder’ to raise productivity and reduce accidents and waste. I am a creative and analytical thinker motivated by a desire to obtain knowledge and share it with the wider world to help collective wisdom use the knowledge in a beneficial way. Seeking roles in Data Analytics, with an ideal goal of working for a group with a mission statement of educating the public, to contribute to their goals by pushing my creative problem solving skills to turn knowledge into wisdom; bringing a constant desire to learn, understand, and share to the team.

## Job description
...
Google's software engineers develop the next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full-stack as we continue to push technology forward.
...
As a Software Engineer on the Shopping Ads team, you will be an "AI First" engineer dedicated to solving complex issues using Generative AI . You will design, implement, and launch innovative Large Language Model (LLM) and Machine Learning (ML) systems to enhance the shopping journey for users worldwide.
...
### Responsibilities
...
* Write product or system development code. 
* Collaborate with peers and stakeholders through design and code reviews to ensure best practices amongst available technologies (e.g., style guidelines, checking code in, accuracy, testability, and efficiency).
...
* Execute and analyze A/B experiments to evaluate performance and ensure long-term value.

In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.

You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.

Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.

handling missing values, identifying outliers, evaluating

Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
